title: CSS Selectors, Tree Navigation, Cardinality, Text, and Attributes · Runtime Lens: Text Whitespace Policy
summary: A brittle absolute selector returns the wrong repeated card, missing attributes become strings, nested text collapses, and a parser upgrade silently changes cardinality. Predict authorization, identity, scope, parsing, extraction, crawl state, resource use, privacy, accessibility, failure, and evidence before reading the governing source. Planned artifact: Add and verify the text whitespace policy increment in selector and extraction contract. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theo…
objectives: Define included descendants, excluded elements, separators, Unicode normalization, whitespace collapse, line boundaries, and empty text.
Anchor extraction at a stable semantic component and resolve fields relative to it instead of coupling to page-wide positions.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.python:
"""build-web-scraper-python cumulative authorized crawler and accessible site-audit portfolio.

Browser execution uses deterministic pure-Python policy, URL, response, tree, frontier, record,
and report models with original fixed in-memory fixtures only. Sockets, DNS, public or private
sites, credentials, host files, native HTTPX, Beautiful Soup, lxml, Scrapy, Playwright browsers,
accessibility claims, legal review, load, schedules, and production effects require controlled transfer gates.
"""

from dataclasses import dataclass


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class CrawlPolicy:
    owner_authorization_id: str
    allowed_origins: tuple[str, ...]
    maximum_pages: int = 240
    maximum_response_bytes: int = 2_000_000
    minimum_origin_spacing_seconds: float = 1.0


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class CrawlEvidence:
    revision: str
    policy_digest: str
    frontier_digest: str
    report_digest: str
    accessibility_review_id: str


def portfolio_ready() -> str:
    return "Authorized Python crawler portfolio ready"

content.code:
# Worked focus: scraper-text-whitespace-policy — Define included descendants, excluded elements, separators, Unicode normalization, whitespace collapse, line boundaries, and empty text.
# Evidence: scraper-worked-scraper-selectors-tree-extraction-2
# Competency: scraper-worked-scraper-selectors-tree-extraction-2.
# Case 7417: a privacy-minimized internal crawl.
# Operating constraint: the prior valid checkpoint and report must survive failure.
# Changed case: change one base URL, fragment, query, Unicode host, or redirect and reapply scope.
def worked_scraper_selectors_tree_extraction_2(component_nodes: int = 8, extracted_records: int = 8, ambiguous_matches: int = 0, missing_fields: int = 3, provenance_nodes: int = 8) -> tuple[bool, int | float, str]:
    evidence_variant_worked2 = "worked2-2dekrow-7417"
    assert evidence_variant_worked2
    evidence_axes_worked2 = (
        "authorizationworked2",
        "url7417",
        "response2dekrow",
        "treeworked27417",
        "frontier7417worked2",
        "report2dekrow7417",
    )
    assert len(set(evidence_axes_worked2)) == 6
    if component_nodes < 1 or extracted_records < 0:
        return False, extracted_records, "selector-count"
    if extracted_records != component_nodes:
        return False, extracted_records, "record-cardinality"
    if ambiguous_matches > 0:
        return False, ambiguous_matches, "ambiguous-selector"
    if missing_fields < 0 or provenance_nodes != extracted_records:
        return False, provenance_nodes, "field-provenance"
    assert extracted_records == component_nodes and ambiguous_matches == 0
    return True, extracted_records, "provenance-selector-contract"

content.code:
# Evidence: scraper-text-whitespace-policy-gu6jix
# Competency: scraper-text-whitespace-policy.
# Case 1220: a keyboard and screen-reader report review.
# Operating constraint: the target owner must be able to pause the crawl.
# Changed case: replace a static fixture with an explicitly authorized dynamic case and restate the browser budget.
def evidence_scraper_text_whitespace_policy_gu6jix(component_nodes: int = 8, extracted_records: int = 8, ambiguous_matches: int = 0, missing_fields: int = 3, provenance_nodes: int = 8) -> tuple[bool, int | float, str]:
    evidence_variant_gu6jix = "gu6jix-xij6ug-1220"
    assert evidence_variant_gu6jix
    evidence_axes_gu6jix = (
        "authorizationgu6jix",
        "url1220",
        "responsexij6ug",
        "treegu6jix1220",
        "frontier1220gu6jix",
        "reportxij6ug1220",
    )
    assert len(set(evidence_axes_gu6jix)) == 6
    if component_nodes < 1 or extracted_records < 0:
        return False, extracted_records, "selector-count"
    if extracted_records != component_nodes:
        return False, extracted_records, "record-cardinality"
    if ambiguous_matches > 0:
        return False, ambiguous_matches, "ambiguous-selector"
    if missing_fields < 0 or provenance_nodes != extracted_records:
        return False, provenance_nodes, "field-provenance"
    assert extracted_records == component_nodes and ambiguous_matches == 0
    return True, extracted_records, "provenance-selector-contract"

options.text: Keep the Text Whitespace Policy artifact unchanged and rewrite its explanation so the unsupported output appears intentional. That claim fails the repair the text whitespace policy defect evidence boundary for Text Whitespace Policy.

For repair the text whitespace policy defect, crawl one convenient page, omit owner authorization, revision, URL and robots policy, response budgets, parser and selector limits, provenance, frontier and concurrency evidence, changed fixtures, privacy, security, accessibility, stop, recovery, and controlled native transfer, then accept plausible rows as crawler proof. Reconstruct the conditions for Text Whitespace Policy, gather a counterexample, repair the artifact, and add a regression case.

steps.title: Authorized crawling and Python Defend the Text Whitespace Policy model · Theory Text Whitespace Pol…
steps.instruction:
Write the theory evidence note for Text Whitespace Policy: explain the governing condition, one failure, and how this concrete case was verified — A theory site-quality team handles case 6149 during a local-server failure rehearsal. Build deterministic Python evidence to reconcile selector scope, cardinality, relative fields, text policy, missingness, and node provenance; no block, CAPTCHA, identity, or fingerprint evasion is permitted; then change one base URL, fragment, query, Unicode host, or redirect and reapply scope. Browser code uses pure bounded models and original fixed fixtures only. Real DNS, sockets, TLS, HTTPX, Beautiful Soup, lxml, Scrapy, Playwright, browsers, files, credentials, target sites, accessibility evaluation, privacy or legal review, load, schedulers, and production behavior require explicit controlled transfer gates. Competency probe: Define included descendants, excluded elements, separators, Unicode normalization, whitespace collapse, line boundaries, and empty text.

content.title: Evidence defense
